_meta.note: Heir Calling Knack catalog from Scion: Dragon (Calling Knacks chapter, pp. 139–146; index pp. 6616–7866). Heirs use this unified list — not Pandora’s Box / deity-titan `knacks.json`. Paraphrased summaries only; confirm costs and tags in the PDF at play.
_meta.callingIdCrosswalkNote: Dragon names the eleven archetypes differently than this app’s `callings.json` labels; each knack’s `callings` array stores the bundle Calling id used for three-row matching in chargen.
